case_title: ARNTZ BUILDERS, A PARTNERSHIP vs. SACRAMENTO INTERIORS, INC. A CORP.

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNTZ BUILDERS, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT SACRAMENTO INTERIORS, INC. A CORP.

HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNTZ BUILDERS, A PARTNERSHIP HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF MAR-21-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SACRAMENTO INTERIORS, INC. A CORP. $14,486.00 PRINCIPAL, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $566.22 INTEREST, $128.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,080.22
